title: Assertion failure on invalid wire width ranges
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
 Yosys 0.8+331 (git sha1 f84a84e3, clang 8.0.0 -fPIC -Os)

yosys> read_verilog width_assert.v 
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `width_assert.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\width_assert'.
ERROR: Assert `range_left >= range_right || (range_left == -1 && range_right == 0)' failed in frontends/ast/genrtlil.cc:905.
```

width_assert.v:

```
module width_assert;
        wire [-2:0] a;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

A frontend error message mentioning the source file, line, the problematic wire name and
the actual computed width range.

## Actual behavior

Assertion failure and program abort.
code_blocks:
Yosys 0.8+331 (git sha1 f84a84e3, clang 8.0.0 -fPIC -Os)

yosys> read_verilog width_assert.v 
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `width_assert.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\width_assert'.
ERROR: Assert `range_left >= range_right || (range_left == -1 && range_right == 0)' failed in frontends/ast/genrtlil.cc:905.
